title: cyrtomium beddomei
intro: Cyrtomium beddomei, also known as the Queensland fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Cyrtomium genus, native to eastern Australia and New Guinea. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyrtomium beddomei include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and burns. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
